view.title: Validate explicit UC need #5
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement to validate the 'Inventory/production linkage for committed vs waiting demand' is not directly supported by the existing evidence. While there are multiple successful booking and waitlist entries, there is no concrete evidence that explicitly confirms the linkage between inventory production and the demand from committed bookings versus those on the waitlist. This lack of specific evidence leads to an inconclusive status for the validation step.
